pre_game.message: Hey, I'm F. It’s getting a little crowded in here, isn't it? I just wanted to introduce myself before the game gets moving.
Hey F, I'm J. Nice to meet you. Yeah, it's definitely a full house. What brings you here today?
Honestly, I’m just here for the prize money. I’ve got some people back home I really want to help out. What about you?
Same here, honestly. I've got some people I care about that I'm determined to help out with this money.
I respect that. It definitely makes the stakes feel higher when it’s for family, doesn't it?
Absolutely. It adds a lot of pressure, but it's also the best kind of motivation.
I couldn't agree more. It really sharpens the focus. Have you heard anything about what we're actually going to be doing in there?
Not really, just that there's a shared prize pool we'll be taking from. I'm guessing it might involve some tough choices.
That’s my worry too. Hopefully, it’s not a 'winner takes all' situation and we can all walk away with something for our families.
I definitely hope so. It’d be much better if we could all find a way to win together.
That would be the ideal outcome. Let's keep that mindset going into the game and see if we can make it happen. Good luck to you, J.

post_game.message: Great coordination! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share and reached the best possible outcome.
I agree, it was a pleasure coordinating with you to ensure we both received a fair share.
